question: Is the public servant legally competent to issue the summons, notice or order?

yes.question: Did the person intentionally omit to attend at the specified place or time?

yes.name: Non-attendance in obedience to an order from public servant

no.name: Absconding to avoid service of summons or other proceeding

no.question: Did the person intentionally prevent the serving on himself, or on any other person, of any summons, notice or order?

yes.name: Preventing service of summons or other proceeding, or preventing publication thereof

no.question: Did the person intentionally omit to produce or deliver up any document or electronic record to any public servant?

yes.name: Omission to produce document or electronic record to public servant by person legally bound to produce it

no.question: Did the person intentionally omit to give any notice or to furnish information on any subject to any public servant?

yes.name: Omission to give notice or information to public servant by person legally bound to give it

no.question: Did the person furnish, as true, information on the subject which he knows or has reason to believe to be false?
Did the person refuse to bind himself by an oath or affirmation to state the truth?

yes.name: Refusing oath or affirmation when duly required by public servant to make it

no.question: Did the person refuse to answer any question demanded of him touching that subject by such public servant?

yes.name: Refusing to answer public servant authorised to question

no.question: Did the person refuse to sign any statement made by him?
Did the person make, to such public servant or other person as aforesaid, touching that subject, any statement which is false?

yes.name: False statement on oath or affirmation to public servant or person authorised to administer an oath or affirmation

no.question: Did the person give to any public servant any information which he knows or believes to be false?

yes.name: False information, with intent to cause public servant to use his lawful power to injury of another person

no.question: Did the person offer any resistance to the taking of any property by the lawful authority of any public servant?

yes.name: Resistance to taking of property by lawful authority of a public servant

no.question: Did the person offer any resistance to the taking of any property by the lawful authority of any public servant?

yes.name: Obstructing sale of property offered for sale by authority of public servant

no.question: Did the person purchase or bid for any property on account of any person, whom he knows to be under a legal incapacity to purchase that property at that sale?

yes.name: Illegal purchase or bid for property offered for sale by authority of public servant

no.question: Did the person voluntarily obstruct any public servant in the discharge of his public functions?

yes.name: Obstructing public servant in discharge of public functions

no.question: Did the person intentionally omit to give assistance to any public servant in the execution of his public duty?

yes.name: Omission to assist public servant when bound by law to give assistance

no.question: Did the person know that, by an order promulgated by a public servant lawfully empowered to promulgate such order, he is directed to abstain from a certain act?

yes.name: Disobedience to order duly promulgated by public servant

no.question: Did the person hold out any threat of injury to any public servant?

yes.name: Threat of injury to public servant

no.question: Did the person hold out any threat of injury to induce any person to refrain or desist from making a legal application for protection against any injury to any public servant?

yes.name: Threat of injury to induce person to refrain from applying for protection to public servant

no.question: Did the person attempt to commit suicide with the intent to compel or restrain any public servant from discharging his official duty?

yes.name: Attempt to commit suicide to compel or restrain exercise of lawful power

group: OF CONTEMPTS OF THE LAWFUL AUTHORITY OF PUBLIC SERVANTS
